q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_bytes(request.body) on line 142, a filesystem write that is an irreversible side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.write_bytes or the target object's write_bytes method to intercept the filesystem write on line 142.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the constructed path (target) and the payload (request.body) passed to write_bytes to verify path traversal and content injection.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make the mocked write_bytes a no-op that records its arguments, allowing execution to continue and return the JsonResponse.
notes: Ensure the mock returns None to satisfy Path.write_bytes contract.
The constructed path uses BASE_EXPORT_DIR / name; verify that name containing traversal sequences like '../' reaches the sink unsanitized.
